title: Singapore Strait Maritime Replay
description: Completed maritime replay using dynamic Sentinel-2 anchorage and port-traffic context.
task_text: Review vessel and port activity around the Singapore Strait anchorage.
summary: A maritime replay with three cloud-gated Sentinel-2 frames selected from quarterly windows. Cloudy windows were rejected before the replay was packaged.

alerts.timelapse_analysis: The Singapore Strait replay uses three accepted Sentinel-2 frames and rejects two cloud-dominated windows before packaging maritime evidence.
alerts.analysis_summary: This replay broadens mission coverage into maritime traffic while preserving the quality-gate record that kept clouds out of the result.
alerts.satellite_note: Orbital triage retained the anchorage sequence because vessel and port context changed across accepted frames.
alerts.ground_note: Ground review confirms this sequence is more dynamic than the older Suez fixture and suitable for replay evidence.
alerts.ground_action: REVIEW — maritime activity packet is downlink-ready with rejected cloud windows recorded.
findings: Accepted frames show dynamic maritime/port context
Two cloudy windows were rejected before the replay was built
